questions.question: What institution can you contact by dialing 1-800-493-ROLL?
questions.answer: The Rock and Roll Hall of Fame and Museum

questions.question: What author said in 1998: "I watch lawyers. I watch trials...I get my ideas from CNN and USA Today"?
